TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: O tatapangan a nona Ko-kol hananay a kosi i, itiniay i Padaka roma sato ira haca i roma a kitakit ko kosi nira O tayal nona kosi i, ira ko pikilim i wang-ci-wang-lo i tingnaw, pisa'osi i in-tewan , sakilosiyang a fana'. Adihay ko nisanga'an naira to sakacaloway no mikitinaway to maamaan a tamdaw, o sakasietan nona kosi i, ona pikilosiyang a tayal nira. Oya mitiliday I se-tan-fo Ta-sey a po-se ci Lay-li Piy-ci ato ci Siy-e-kay Po-li ko patirengay tona Ko-kol(Google), mansa ca Ko-kol malacafayay hananay no 'alomanay a pangangan kona tatosaay. google pikilim Ona google pikilim hananay i, o nipahadakan no google kosi a incing to sapikilim i wang-ci-wang-lo , o sata'angay, saadihayay a sapiklim a incing i wang-ci-wang-lo . Mata'eli to tosa a co'ol no ca'ol to pikakilim no nanicowacowaay a tamdaw ko pitayal nona incing nona google pikilim, cowa aca pikilim to wang-yi a cecay ko nitayalan nira, ira haca ko pikilim to conga, sinpon, sipon wang-yi , ika. Google Chrome sakinengneng O Wep-kit(WebKit) hananaya incing to sakinengneng i wang-yi kona Google Chrome. I 2012 miheca 5 folad 21 romi'ad i, 33% ko no Chrome a nitayalan, makiysoay nira ko IE, o sakakaay to cira, halo o IE ato Firefox a makatatolo naira a miala to sakinengneng i wang-yi a tayal. Android sakitayal O niparoan i kikay a sakitayal kona Android. 2010 miheca, itini i nikinkiwan i ki-na-les(Canalys) i, o saetanay a sakitayal kona Android i ce-howay-sing so-ci saan. Google conga O sapikilim to kaitiraan kona Ku-kol conga nona Ku-kol kosi. Nga'ayay to sapikilim to taliyok no lalan no hatini. Pi'arawan to lakaw
S.PHON: o~u tatapaŇčan a no~una ko~u-ko~u…ĺ ńßananaj a ko~usi i, itiniaj i pa…¨~…ģaka ro~uma sato~u ira ńßa ¶a i ro~uma a kitakit ko~u ko~usi nira o~u taja…ĺ no~una ko~usi i, ira ko~u piki…ĺim i waŇč- ¶i-waŇč-…ĺo~u i tiŇčnaw, pisa °o~usi i in-t…ôwan , saki…ĺo~usijaŇč a fana °. a…¨~…ģińßaj ko~u nisaŇča °an naira to~u saka ¶a…ĺo~uwaj no~u mikitinawaj to~u maamaan a tam…¨~…ģaw, o~u sakasi…ôtan no~una ko~usi i, o~una piki…ĺo~usijaŇč a taja…ĺ nira. o~uja miti…ĺi…¨~…ģaj i s…ô-tan-fo~u ta-s…ôj a po~u-s…ô ¶i …ĺaj-…ĺi pij- ¶i ato~u ¶i sij-…ô-kaj po~u-…ĺi ko~u patir…ôŇčaj to~una ko~u-ko~u…ĺ(*o~uo~u*…ĺ…ô), mansa ¶a ko~u-ko~u…ĺ ma…ĺa ¶afajaj ńßananaj no~u °a…ĺo~umanaj a paŇčaŇčan ko~una tato~usaaj. *o~uo~u*…ĺ…ô piki…ĺim o~una *o~uo~u*…ĺ…ô piki…ĺim ńßananaj i, o~u nipańßa…¨~…ģakan no~u *o~uo~u*…ĺ…ô ko~usi a in ¶iŇč to~u sapiki…ĺim i waŇč- ¶i-waŇč-…ĺo~u , o~u sata °aŇčaj, saa…¨~…ģińßajaj a sapik…ĺim a in ¶iŇč i waŇč- ¶i-waŇč-…ĺo~u . mata °…ô…ĺi to~u to~usa a ¶o~u °o~u…ĺ no~u ¶a °o~u…ĺ to~u pikaki…ĺim no~u nani ¶o~uwa ¶o~uwaaj a tam…¨~…ģaw ko~u pitaja…ĺ no~una in ¶iŇč no~una *o~uo~u*…ĺ…ô piki…ĺim, ¶o~uwa a ¶a piki…ĺim to~u waŇč-ji a ¶…ô ¶aj ko~u nitaja…ĺan nira, ira ńßa ¶a ko~u piki…ĺim to~u ¶o~uŇča, sinpo~un, sipo~un waŇč-ji , ika. *o~uo~u*…ĺ…ô ¶ńßro~um…ô sakin…ôŇčn…ôŇč o~u w…ôp-kit(w…ôb~b~vkit) ńßananaja in ¶iŇč to~u sakin…ôŇčn…ôŇč i waŇč-ji ko~una *o~uo~u*…ĺ…ô ¶ńßro~um…ô. i **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i, **% ko~u no~u ¶ńßro~um…ô a nitaja…ĺan, makijso~uaj nira ko~u i…ô, o~u sakakaaj to~u ¶ira, ńßa…ĺo~u o~u i…ô ato~u fir…ôfo~ux a makatato~u…ĺo~u naira a mia…ĺa to~u sakin…ôŇčn…ôŇč i waŇč-ji a taja…ĺ. an…¨~…ģro~ui…¨~…ģ sakitaja…ĺ o~u niparo~uan i kikaj a sakitaja…ĺ ko~una an…¨~…ģro~ui…¨~…ģ. **** mińß…ô ¶a, itini i nikinkiwan i ki-na-…ĺ…ôs( ¶ana…ĺjs) i, o~u sa…ôtanaj a sakitaja…ĺ ko~una an…¨~…ģro~ui…¨~…ģ i ¶…ô-ńßo~uwaj-siŇč so~u- ¶i saan. *o~uo~u*…ĺ…ô ¶o~uŇča o~u sapiki…ĺim to~u kaitiraan ko~una ko~u~u-ko~u…ĺ ¶o~uŇča no~una ko~u~u-ko~u…ĺ ko~usi. Ňča °ajaj to~u sapiki…ĺim to~u ta…ĺijo~uk no~u …ĺa…ĺan no~u ńßatini. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw
S.FORM: O tatapangan a nona Ko-kol hananay a kosi i, itiniay i Padaka roma sato ira haca i roma a kitakit ko kosi nira O tayal nona kosi i, ira ko pikilim i wang-ci-wang-lo i tingnaw, pisa'osi i in-tewan , sakilosiyang a fana'. Adihay ko nisanga'an naira to sakacaloway no mikitinaway to maamaan a tamdaw, o sakasietan nona kosi i, ona pikilosiyang a tayal nira. Oya mitiliday I se-tan-fo Ta-sey a po-se ci Lay-li Piy-ci ato ci Siy-e-kay Po-li ko patirengay tona Ko-kol(Google), mansa ca Ko-kol malacafayay hananay no 'alomanay a pangangan kona tatosaay. google pikilim Ona google pikilim hananay i, o nipahadakan no google kosi a incing to sapikilim i wang-ci-wang-lo , o sata'angay, saadihayay a sapiklim a incing i wang-ci-wang-lo . Mata'eli to tosa a co'ol no ca'ol to pikakilim no nanicowacowaay a tamdaw ko pitayal nona incing nona google pikilim, cowa aca pikilim to wang-yi a cecay ko nitayalan nira, ira haca ko pikilim to conga, sinpon, sipon wang-yi , ika. Google Chrome sakinengneng O Wep-kit(WebKit) hananaya incing to sakinengneng i wang-yi kona Google Chrome. I 2012 miheca 5 folad 21 romi'ad i, 33% ko no Chrome a nitayalan, makiysoay nira ko IE, o sakakaay to cira, halo o IE ato Firefox a makatatolo naira a miala to sakinengneng i wang-yi a tayal. Android sakitayal O niparoan i kikay a sakitayal kona Android. 2010 miheca, itini i nikinkiwan i ki-na-les(Canalys) i, o saetanay a sakitayal kona Android i ce-howay-sing so-ci saan. Google conga O sapikilim to kaitiraan kona Ku-kol conga nona Ku-kol kosi. Nga'ayay to sapikilim to taliyok no lalan no hatini. Pi'arawan to lakaw
S.PHON: o~u tatapaŇčan a no~una ko~u-ko~u…ĺ ńßananaj a ko~usi i, itiniaj i pa…¨~…ģaka ro~uma sato~u ira ńßa ¶a i ro~uma a kitakit ko~u ko~usi nira o~u taja…ĺ no~una ko~usi i, ira ko~u piki…ĺim i waŇč- ¶i-waŇč-…ĺo~u i tiŇčnaw, pisa °o~usi i in-t…ôwan , saki…ĺo~usijaŇč a fana °. a…¨~…ģińßaj ko~u nisaŇča °an naira to~u saka ¶a…ĺo~uwaj no~u mikitinawaj to~u maamaan a tam…¨~…ģaw, o~u sakasi…ôtan no~una ko~usi i, o~una piki…ĺo~usijaŇč a taja…ĺ nira. o~uja miti…ĺi…¨~…ģaj i s…ô-tan-fo~u ta-s…ôj a po~u-s…ô ¶i …ĺaj-…ĺi pij- ¶i ato~u ¶i sij-…ô-kaj po~u-…ĺi ko~u patir…ôŇčaj to~una ko~u-ko~u…ĺ(*o~uo~u*…ĺ…ô), mansa ¶a ko~u-ko~u…ĺ ma…ĺa ¶afajaj ńßananaj no~u °a…ĺo~umanaj a paŇčaŇčan ko~una tato~usaaj. *o~uo~u*…ĺ…ô piki…ĺim o~una *o~uo~u*…ĺ…ô piki…ĺim ńßananaj i, o~u nipańßa…¨~…ģakan no~u *o~uo~u*…ĺ…ô ko~usi a in ¶iŇč to~u sapiki…ĺim i waŇč- ¶i-waŇč-…ĺo~u , o~u sata °aŇčaj, saa…¨~…ģińßajaj a sapik…ĺim a in ¶iŇč i waŇč- ¶i-waŇč-…ĺo~u . mata °…ô…ĺi to~u to~usa a ¶o~u °o~u…ĺ no~u ¶a °o~u…ĺ to~u pikaki…ĺim no~u nani ¶o~uwa ¶o~uwaaj a tam…¨~…ģaw ko~u pitaja…ĺ no~una in ¶iŇč no~una *o~uo~u*…ĺ…ô piki…ĺim, ¶o~uwa a ¶a piki…ĺim to~u waŇč-ji a ¶…ô ¶aj ko~u nitaja…ĺan nira, ira ńßa ¶a ko~u piki…ĺim to~u ¶o~uŇča, sinpo~un, sipo~un waŇč-ji , ika. *o~uo~u*…ĺ…ô ¶ńßro~um…ô sakin…ôŇčn…ôŇč o~u w…ôp-kit(w…ôb~b~vkit) ńßananaja in ¶iŇč to~u sakin…ôŇčn…ôŇč i waŇč-ji ko~una *o~uo~u*…ĺ…ô ¶ńßro~um…ô. i **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i, **% ko~u no~u ¶ńßro~um…ô a nitaja…ĺan, makijso~uaj nira ko~u i…ô, o~u sakakaaj to~u ¶ira, ńßa…ĺo~u o~u i…ô ato~u fir…ôfo~ux a makatato~u…ĺo~u naira a mia…ĺa to~u sakin…ôŇčn…ôŇč i waŇč-ji a taja…ĺ. an…¨~…ģro~ui…¨~…ģ sakitaja…ĺ o~u niparo~uan i kikaj a sakitaja…ĺ ko~una an…¨~…ģro~ui…¨~…ģ. **** mińß…ô ¶a, itini i nikinkiwan i ki-na-…ĺ…ôs( ¶ana…ĺjs) i, o~u sa…ôtanaj a sakitaja…ĺ ko~una an…¨~…ģro~ui…¨~…ģ i ¶…ô-ńßo~uwaj-siŇč so~u- ¶i saan. *o~uo~u*…ĺ…ô ¶o~uŇča o~u sapiki…ĺim to~u kaitiraan ko~una ko~u~u-ko~u…ĺ ¶o~uŇča no~una ko~u~u-ko~u…ĺ ko~usi. Ňča °ajaj to~u sapiki…ĺim to~u ta…ĺijo~uk no~u …ĺa…ĺan no~u ńßatini. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw
